description: A template for building custom UI plugins for Vertesia

choices.title: Shadow DOM
choices.description: Shadow DOM will be used to fully isolate the plugin.

choices.title: CSS-only isolation
choices.description: Injects Tailwind utilities into host DOM; not fully isolated. Lighter but may generate conflicts.

choices.title: Slate-blue (light default, dark mode supported)
choices.description: Calm professional palette. Good neutral starting point.

choices.title: Indigo + violet (richer brand feel)
Cyan accent — futuristic dark default
choices.description: Neon cyan primary tuned for a dark-first plugin. Pair with class="dark" on <html>.

choices.title: Lime accent — friendly light default
choices.description: Energetic green primary for tools-feeling plugins.

prompts.name: ASSISTANT_INTERACTION
prompts.message: Assistant interaction id (the agent the persistent assistant will run)
